subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-15 in Liverpool
subcodes.first_line: It is good that this church is open to everyone, and is the cause of fellowship among every sect and creed, inasmuch as whatever is universal is of God, and that which is particular is of humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: این خوب است که آزادی عمومی دارد و سبب الفت هر فرقه و ملّتی است زیرا هر امر عمومی الهی است و هر امر خصوصی
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @universality of the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
